description: Nigerian religious blocs and their historical political alignments. Partially documented.

data.historical_alignment: CAN generally opposes Muslim-Muslim presidential ticket. Strongly endorsed Obi (LP) in 2023 given Christian-Christian ticket. CAN is politically influential in NC, SW, SE, SS.
data.alignment_2023: Endorsed LP/Obi-Datti ticket (both Christian); opposed APC Muslim-Muslim ticket of Tinubu-Shettima

data.historical_alignment: Major northern Islamic organization. Generally aligned with political interests of northern Muslim candidates.

data.bloc: Nigerian Supreme Council for Islamic Affairs (NSCIA)
data.historical_alignment: Moderate; Sultan of Sokoto historically a stabilizing political voice rather than partisan actor.
Often aligns with CAN on political matters. Large mobilizing capacity in SW, SS, SE.

gaps.note: This file is lightly populated. Fetch CAN press releases, JNI statements, and PFN statements for 2023 and 2025-2026 from Premium Times / Daily Trust archives.
